query:
UPDATE registrations r
JOIN passport_info pi ON UPPER(TRIM(r.name)) = UPPER(TRIM(pi.fullName))
SET r.passportImageUrl = pi.passportImageUrl
WHERE pi.passportImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND pi.passportImageUrl != ''
AND (r.passportImageUrl IS NULL OR r.passportImageUrl = '');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZhmXq2fuwbq2e6E.b3f96895581d --database 9L2UFkGMTFNGvGrFPN8jYv --execute UPDATE registrations r

SET r.passportImageUrl = pi.passportImageUrl

AND (r.passportImageUrl IS NULL OR r.passportImageUrl = '');
